meta.title: Ocha Travel Transport | Private Car Service with Driver, Thailand
meta.description: Private car service with driver, van tours, VIP vehicles across Thailand 24/7. Call 0661244999

hero.title: Private Car Service with Driver,Nationwide 24/7
hero.tagline: Airport transfers, tours, excursions, and travel on every route. Safe, reliable, and always on time.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Founded with a commitment to the best car rental experience, Ocha Travel has grown from over 9 years of expertise. Well-maintained vehicles, carefully selected drivers, and strict safety standards — trusted by both Thai and international customers on every route.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a wide range of vehicles with professional drivers for every route.

items.name: Sedan
items.description: Perfect for city travel, airport transfers, and business appointments.

items.name: SUV
items.description: Ideal for families, provincial trips, and comfortable long-distance travel.

items.name: Van 10 Seats
items.description: Standard van for small groups, tours, and airport transfers.

items.name: VIP Van + Alphard
items.description: Comfortable VIP van for small group tours and special events.

items.name: Large Van
items.description: Large van for big groups, nationwide tours, and educational trips.

items.name: Pickup Truck + 6-Wheeler, 10-Wheeler
items.description: Cargo transport service for moving goods and deliveries across Thailand.
